title: silken lazy-sunday algerian tofu tagine
description: a comforting, slow-cooked algerian dish featuring silken tofu, served in a banana leaf vessel.
instructions: in a large, heavy pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
add the chopped onion and saut9516ut until softened, about 5 minutes.
add the silken tofu, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
season with salt, pepper, and a pinch of cumin.
transfer the mixture to a banana leaf vessel, folding the leaf to create a package.
place the vessel in a large steamer basket, and steam over boiling water for 20-25 minutes, or until the tofu is tender and the flavors have melded together.
